_meta.author: Peter Higgins
_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for all HUF project identity, contact information, websites, canonical names, terms, standards, and administrative references. Extends RWA-001. If any AI or document uses a different name, URL, or term — this file wins.

principal.name: Peter Higgins
principal.role: Independent Researcher, Framework Author, Sole Operator

corporate.standard_description: Rogue Wave Audio Corporate Reference Standard — governs all HUF operational procedures
corporate.note: Rogue Wave Audio is Peter's corporate identity. RWA-001 is the governance standard under which HUF operates.

project.tagline: Compositional structure as an open-loop monitoring signal.
project.status: STABLE — repo restructured, AI refresh layer validated across 5 platforms, pre-publication
project.domain: Compositional data analysis (CoDa), Aitchison geometry, monitoring systems

milestones.2026-02: Ratio State Monitoring name locked for literature submission
milestones.2026-03: GitHub repo launched, multi-AI collaboration established
milestones.2026-04-13: Full repo restructure. AI refresh layer (FAST_REFRESH + INTEGRITY_MANIFEST + ADMIN + spec) validated across Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, Copilot, Gemini. 286 files organized into 12 top-level folders. All five cold-start tests passed (10/10 questions). System declared STABLE.

web_presence.note: GitHub Pages is live and serves the README as a public site. This is the primary web-indexable URL.

governance.doctrine: Instrument reads, never actuates. Human decides, loop stays open.

pll.description: 6 rules that cannot be changed without operator (Peter) approval

keff.description: RMS aggregator of 4 polarity-aligned roots (a0-a3), locked at p=2

bell_test.description: Gas carrier acts as entangling gate. 9 structural isomorphisms between QIT and CoDa.

codawork_2026.full_name: 11th International Workshop on Compositional Data Analysis
codawork_2026.presentation_strategy: Stanley Steamer — their tools, their geometry, your application. Gas turbine stays in the garage.

ember.usage: Primary energy composition data — 6 countries, 8 carriers, 24 years

ngfs.full: Network for Greening the Financial System Phase 4

chemixhub.usage: 500,000 chemical mixture data points, 7 datasets — EITT chemistry extension

ai_collaborators.model: Multi-AI collaborative development with human gate
ai_collaborators.gate: Peter Higgins — all changes go through Peter, no AI pushes directly

claude.role: Document building, structure, repository management, coherence refresh

chatgpt.role: Deep analysis, review, second opinion, HUF spec development

grok.role: Adversarial testing, PLL compliance, robustness derivations

copilot.role: Code contribution, pipeline scripts, EITT boundary roadmap

ai_collaborators.communication: Repository-mediated. ai-refresh/ is the shared onboarding layer. FAST_REFRESH.json is the single source of truth across all platforms.

gemini.note: Best instruction-following, inferred structure from manifest paths

cold_start_validation.conclusion: All 5 platforms achieved 100% question accuracy from FAST_REFRESH. System validated for cross-AI cold-start onboarding.

mathematical_foundations.note: HUF does not claim new mathematics. These are the foundations it builds on.

aitchison.author: John Aitchison
aitchison.contribution: Compositional data analysis, simplex geometry, log-ratio transforms

claims: Composition can be monitored directly, not only as a statistical correction
In some systems, structural change appears in ratio-state before magnitude-based indicators visibly fail
Shannon entropy is near-invariant under geometric-mean decimation of compositional time series (EITT)
non_claims: Universal validity — cross-domain validity must be earned domain by domain
Every compositional change is harmful, actionable, or predictive
HUF replaces domain expertise, causal explanation, or policy judgment
Autonomous intervention is justified on compositional readings alone
key_claims.falsifiable: No existing monitoring framework performs compositional change detection at the carrier level with formal perturbation-based drift measurement.

file_hierarchy.conflict_resolution: HUF_ADMIN.json wins on identity/contact/naming. FAST_REFRESH wins on numbers/formulas/science. If both address the same field, they must agree — any disagreement is a bug to be reported to Peter.
